reviews.comment:
Es el ACA, si lo conoces sabes lo que te vas a encontrar...
No es eficiente, no son rápidos y son tan burocráticos como el estado, pero  funciona.

(Translated by Google)
It's the ACA; if you know it, you know what to expect... It's not efficient, it's not fast, and it's as bureaucratic as the government, but it works.

reviews.comment:
Siempre es un gusto cargar en este ACA. Rapido, limpio, ordenado.

(Translated by Google)
It's always a pleasure to load up at this ACA. Fast, clean, and organized.

Very good place and service

reviews.comment:
Un desastre, la según vez en el día que vengo, nunca ví una estación que demoren tanto en atenderte. Tiren una cantidad de surtidores pero no les andan, no los usan. Te dicen que estaciones en un surtidor y después te dicen que no anda que vayas al otro.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. This is the second time I've been here today. I've never seen a station with such long wait times. They have a ton of pumps, but they don't work; they don't use them. They tell you to pump at one station, then they tell you it's not working and to go to another one.

reviewReply.comment: Bs noches es feriado y bajo el combustible nos superó la demanda de trabajo y se trabaja con menos gente por el feriado gracias

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZak42US1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui el 30/4 a las 10 de la noche. Me cambiaron la pila de la llave del auto. Super atento el chico que nos atendió

(Translated by Google)
I went on April 30th at 10 PM. They changed the battery in my car key. The guy who helped us was super helpful.

reviewReply.comment: Y a veces falla el sistema le pefimos disculpas gracias
